overview: Fantasy11 is a live Dream11-style fantasy sports platform with real-time cricket scores, ball-by-ball updates, player avatars, and animated live match indicators.
features: Live cricket match scores via CricAPI
Ball-by-ball scoring feed with event animations
Player avatar photos and team/country flag logos
Animated SVG live indicators and score change effects
Fantasy team builder with live player stats
Contest discovery with entry fees and prize pools
